zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun於1595年出生時，她的父親Podolsko DeBoussoyne37歲，母親Bellen DePodalsko35歲。她於大約1617年與James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1659年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特聖 馬丁 在 馮 菲爾茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun于1595年出生时，她的父亲Podolsko DeBoussoyne37岁，母亲Bellen DePodalsko35岁。她于大约1617年与James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1659年在苏格兰米德洛迪安享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特聖 馬丁 在 馮 菲爾茲。

nameMeanings.name: Podolsko,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Galima, Gennady, Grigory, Lubov, Mikhail, Milya, Nonna, Pasha, Svetlana, Yevgeny, Yevsey.  Jewish Gerson, Hyman, Yakov.

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) and Ukrainian; Slovak and Czech (Podolský): habitational name for someone from Podolia in Ukraine (a region which had a large Jewish population from the Middle Ages up to the Second World War; it is named Podolye in Yiddish), or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous other places called Podole. Compare Podolski .

variants.name: Podolski
meanings: Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Podolia in Ukraine (named Podole in Polish, Podolye in Yiddish), or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous other places called Podole. See also   Podolsky  .
In some cases this may also be a variant transliteration of Ukrainian   Podolsky  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese (Ōi): written 大井 ‘large well’. It is found in central and eastern Japan.
Japanese (Ōi): written 多 ‘many’. It was pronounced Oho in ancient times and is listed in the Shinsen shōjiroku. It is not common in modern Japan.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 黃, see   Huang   1.

variants.name: Huang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Wei, Ming, Jian, Ying, Yi, Jing, Wen, Jin, Ping, Min, Yong, Cheng, Hong, Chong, Chang, Pao, Sha, Shen, Tun, You, Chung, Shiu, Ti, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 黄, meaning ‘yellow’ in Chinese: (i) from Huang (黃), the name of an ancient state (present-day Huangchuan in Henan province)annexed by the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) traced back to some minority ethnic groups in ancient southern China.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Bussoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: from Boson, a inflected form of the ancient Germanic personal name Boso .

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun was born in 1595, her father, Podolsko DeBoussoyne, was 37 and her mother, Bellen DePodalsko, was 35. She married James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun about 1617, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1659, in Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun est née en 1595, son père, Podolsko DeBoussoyne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Bellen DePodalsko, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun environ 1617, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1659, à Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun 1595 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Podolsko DeBoussoyne 37 und ihre Mutter Bellen DePodalsko 35. Sie hat um 1617 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1659 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun circa 1617, nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletounが1595年に生まれた時，父Podolsko DeBoussoyneは37歳，母Bellen DePodalskoは35歳であった。約1617年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンでJames Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1659年にスコットランドミドロスアンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスタースト マルティン イン ス フィールズにて埋葬された。

ko.St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Gr: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 스트 마틴 인 테 필드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun(이)가 1595년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Podolsko DeBoussoyne(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bellen DePodalsko(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1617년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 스트 마틴 인 테 필드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun nasceu em 1595, seu pai, Podolsko DeBoussoyne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Bellen DePodalsko, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun aproximadamente 1617, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1659, em Midlothian, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Gr: ст мартинь ин т фиелдс, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun родилась в 1595 г., её отцу по имени Podolsko DeBoussoyne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Bellen DePodalsko, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun около 1617 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1659 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мартинь ин т фиелдс, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun aproximadamente 1617, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1659, en Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
